title: Nursery Rhyme. DCXXII. Relics.
content:
We're all in the dumps,
            For diamonds are trumps;
        The kittens are gone to St. Paul's!
            The babies are bit,
            The moon's in a fit,
        And the houses are built without walls.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DCXXII. Relics." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
